title: Playlists
description: Manage your playlists – group songs that you frequently use together.
name: Name
noSongs: This playlist has no songs yet.
emptyDescription: Create your first playlist and add songs to it.
selectPlaylistPrompt: Pick a playlist to see its songs.
noPlaylistsInDialogDescription: Create playlists under "Playlists" to see them here.
confirmDeleteDescription: Really delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
createDescription: Provide a name and optionally a description.
notFound: This playlist could not be found.
